creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
> Maintainer of dns/drill,
    
> Please note that PR ports/137847 has just been submitted.
    
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
    
Yes, this is a patch for an upgrade. I checked the patch, it works as
promised. I approve this patch. Thanks!


	jaap
